notes: No admin can arbitrarily pause the protocol or restrict user access. Emergency shutdown exists but requires burning a significant amount of tokens.

evidence.name: Emergency Shutdown
evidence.summary: The only way to "pause" the protocol is Emergency Shutdown, which requires burning tokens past a threshold. This is a nuclear option, not an admin switch.

evidence.name: No Arbitrary Pause
evidence.summary: Core contracts have no pause function. Users can always interact with the protocol.
